query: Interview me about how I actually produce client proposals before suggesting automation.
I want a personal workflow OS, but please ask one useful question at a time.
Inspect my SOPs and vault tree, infer what you can, then confirm the important gaps with me.
Map the recurring work of my field-service job without assuming a technician template.
Before we design skills, help me identify outcomes, work streams, and safety boundaries.
Resume my incomplete Praxis discovery session from praxis/profile.json.
I hate questionnaires; can we discover my workflow conversationally and persist each confirmed decision?
Ask me the next consequential question and recommend the likely answer with trade-offs.
The profile is complete and approved; turn it into a workflow constitution and skill graph.
Install the approved workflow into my Obsidian vault with a dry run.
Capture the decision we just made without storing the transcript.
Analyze repeated false triggers from the last 30 workflow runs.
Create evals for this existing skill before we change its instructions.
Interview three job candidates and score their answers.
Summarize this customer interview transcript into themes.
Draft ten survey questions for market research.
